description_long: This is a multi-story commercial bank building with a modern, geometric design, featuring a prominent vertical tower and several horizontal overhangs. The structure is surrounded by a landscaped plaza with paved walkways, trees, and shrubbery, all set within a circular boundary. The main entrance is located at the base of the tower, marked by a glass canopy and flanked by large windows. The building's facade is primarily composed of concrete and glass, with blue-tinted windows and a minimalist aesthetic. At the top of the tower, there is a large sign with a logo and text, indicating the bank's identity. The overall environment suggests a secure, professional, and accessible financial institution in an urban setting.
description: A modern, multi-story bank building with a concrete and glass facade, surrounded by landscaped walkways and trees. The structure features a prominent tower, a glass-canopied entrance, and a large rooftop sign.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a glass canopy, paved plaza, and the bank's rooftop sign clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's vertical tower, horizontal overhangs, and landscaped trees along the perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the tower, dense tree coverage, and the rooftop sign from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tower's side profile, additional landscaping, and the building's layered structure.
attribute_signage: A large rectangular sign with a blue background and white text/logo is mounted on the rooftop tower. The word 'DeLaSalle' is visible above the main entrance.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance features a single wide glass door beneath a flat glass canopy, flanked by large windows and set within a recessed entryway. The design is minimalist with clean lines and no visible decorative elements.
